# Partenaire Croissance
> AI-powered B2B software tools and lead enrichment for home-service businesses.

## Tools
- [TradeQuote Pro](https://www.partenairecroissance.com/tradequote/): Free construction estimating calculators for contractors and trades.
- [All 21 Tools](https://www.partenairecroissance.com/): Free B2B calculators, compliance trackers, and business utilities.

## Services
- [AI SDR Lead Enrichment](https://www.partenairecroissance.com/sdr/): Find home-service businesses running paid ads, enriched with decision-maker contacts.

## Guides
- [Blog](https://www.partenairecroissance.com/blog/): SEO-optimized guides on construction estimating, Meta/Google Ads for tradies, and lead generation.

## About
Partenaire Croissance provides free B2B software tools and AI-powered sales development services for small and medium businesses across North America.
